description_of_loss: On 04/25/2025, a tree located on property owned by Riverside Construction Group at 3200 Westheimer Road, Houston, TX 77098 fell onto our insured's property at 1650 Borel Place, Suite 200, San Mateo, CA 94402. The tree, which our arborist confirms was dead or severely diseased prior to the incident, caused substantial damage to our insured's roof and upper bedroom.
